title: silene littorea var. cambessedesii
intro: Silene littorea var. cambessedesii is a variety of the Silene littorea plant, also known as the 'sea campion', which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Silene littorea var. cambessedesii include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes, making it a popular treatment for minor wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area for relief from inflammation and discomfort.
